metadata.description: Hair Solutions Co. AI toolkit — agents, skills, and commands for Claude, Cursor, and other AI apps.

plugins.name: ai-video
plugins.description: AI-powered video creation and management: HeyGen avatar video generation, video content strategy with Video-Cog, and Mux video infrastructure for streaming.

plugins.name: analytics-ads
plugins.description: Analytics and advertising intelligence: Google Analytics 4 reporting, Google Tag Manager implementation, and Google Ads Scripts automation for data-driven growth.

plugins.name: business-integrations
plugins.description: Connect and automate HubSpot CRM, Notion workspace, Instagram, n8n workflows, and 1000+ apps via Composio. Essential stack for Hair Solutions Co. operations.

plugins.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
plugins.description: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer.

plugins.name: hubspot
plugins.description: HubSpot for Hair Solutions Co. — split into focused skills: CRM data model, business operations & automation strategy, developer integrations (Agent Tools, Breeze, Custom Channels), and step-by-step UI how-to procedures.

plugins.name: marketing-content
plugins.description: Full-stack marketing suite: social media, paid ads, SEO, email sequences, copywriting, and content research. Built for e-commerce and service business growth.

plugins.name: shopify-design
plugins.description: Complete Shopify development and design toolkit: Liquid templating, theme development, Shopify API, performance optimization, debugging, UI/UX design system, and Figma automation.

plugins.name: shopify-developer
plugins.description: Shopify theme development for Hair Solutions Co. — Horizon 3.5.1 Liquid, front-end CSS/JS, and production operations.

plugins.name: shopify-liquid-designer
plugins.description: Design-first Shopify theme development for Hair Solutions Co. Design in Figma first, generate production-ready Liquid with floating cards, Horizon theme mastery, Storefront API support, and full UI/UX intelligence.

plugins.name: shopify-theme-dev
plugins.description: Designer-in-Chief, Creative Director, and Liquid-specialist toolkit for the OneHead Hair Solutions storefront (hairsolutions.co) — brand system, OS 2.0 sections, Cloudinary AssetLink media, Notion change-tracker, and ship-to-main workflow.
